entries.title: Matthew 7:4
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content:
That. 24:31; Ge 12:3; 22:18; 28:14; 49:10; Ps 22:27; 98:3; Isa 2:2,3; 11:10 Isa 49:6; 52:10; 60:1-6; Jer 16:19; Da 2:44; Mic 4:1,2; Zec 8:20-23 Mal 1:11; Lu 13:29; 14:23,24; Ac 10:45; 11:18; 14:27; Ro 15:9-13 Ga 3:28,29; Eph 2:11-14; 3:6; Col 3:11; Re 7:6 shall sit.[Anaklino klino ,] shall recline, i.e., at table; referring to the recumbent posture used by the easterners at their meals.

Lu 12:37; 13:29; 16:22; Re 3:20,21 in. 3:2; Lu 13:28; Ac 14:22; 1Co 6:9; 15:20; 2Th 1:5
